_comment: Effect definitions — Silencer GAS data. Loaded by GASLoader::LoadEffects(). Maps named effect IDs to sprite bank animation sequences. No C++ behavior is driven by this file yet — it documents intent for the data-driven VFX migration.

effects.name: Plume (Explosion)
effects.description: Used by rockets and grenades on impact. PLUME object cycles these frames then self-destructs.

effects.name: HealMachine Animation
effects.description: HealMachine object idle animation. Bank 172 shared with explosion plumes.

effects.name: TechStation Animation
effects.description: TechStation object idle animation — cycles 8 frames.

effects.name: SecretReturn Billboard
effects.description: Animated billboard shown when a secret is returned.

effects.name: Jetpack Flame Overlay
effects.description: Flame overlay drawn on player while jetpack is active.
